profile.name: Stitch Dev
profile.bio: I build high-energy, tactile digital experiences with clear grids and wild decorations. I believe the web should be fun, interactive, and smile at you.

experience.description: Lead engineer on a design-system-first component library serving 40+ internal products. Championed accessibility audits and reduced bundle size by 35%.
Built interactive marketing pages and a headless CMS frontend using Next.js and Framer Motion. Shipped 12 campaigns with zero accessibility regressions.
Developed responsive web apps for startups across fintech and edtech. Introduced Tailwind CSS and component-driven architecture to the team.

projects.title: Cosmic UI Kit
projects.description: A comprehensive set of geometric primitives and composable components for modern design systems.

projects.title: Playground App
projects.description: An interactive canvas for testing tactile buttons, physics-driven objects, and delightful micro-interactions.

projects.title: Grid Master
projects.description: Visualize and prototype complex responsive layouts with a playful drag-and-drop dot-grid interface.
